node.text: Jolene has a snake as a pet, finds it calming, and a great connection with nature.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "adopt snake Susie") on Session 14 (Score: 0.64)

node.text: Jolene had a 'snake adventure' where her snake got out, but she found her snuggling under the bed after hours of searching.

node.text: Jolene finds comfort and distraction through her pet Susie and video games during tough times.

node.text: Jolene adopted Susie two years ago when feeling lonely.
